Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and multiple QA retesting cycles (3-4% leakage) evidenced in both JIRA and Metrics Report, there is a risk that testing costs and timelines will overrun, which could lead to financial loss and delayed delivery.

Because of recurring environment and access permission delays (cycle time 5-6 days) confirmed in both JIRA and Metrics Report, there is a risk that delivery milestones will be missed, which could lead to SLA breach and delayed go-live.
Because of consistent PR approval delays (evidenced in JIRA and Metrics), there is a risk that cycle times will remain elevated, which could lead to missed sprint goals and resource overutilization.
